title: Tell Your Patients About The Hidden Costs To You
filename: Tell Your Patients About The Hidden Costs To You.en.vtt
excerpt: If they think they're paying for a mill and say there's a complication like they react to the product and then you reverse it they'll often ask for a refund it sometimes feels when you first start like a huge markup i remember having this feeling of you know i'd be with a client …

segments.text: if they think they're paying for a mill and say there's a complication like they react to the product and then you reverse it they'll often ask for a refund it sometimes feels when you first start like a huge markup i remember having this feeling of you know i'd be with a client for half an hour and i could generate 600 pounds and i felt wow this is incredible but what i was failing to take into account is we had spent three months building up to getting that client to come to our clinic you know we'd been talking to salon owners we've been producing leaflets we've been posting on social media all the stuff that you do and also that half an hour was not my commitment to that my commitment was anything that goes wrong from that day forth that's related to that treatment i will also look after you most clinicians in our sector provide aftercare free of charge and their patients are often not aware of that they think i'm paying for a meal but if something goes wrong with that mail that clinician will see you as many times as it takes until they've done everything they can to get you back to where you started to protect you from any of these complications which are par

for the course and that is built in and often not appreciated i think because we don't communicate it well enough how can we communicate it though because one of the uh the blockers i used to have in my mind was if i say out loud we are good because we'll look after you and we will you know if you have if something goes wrong you almost don't want to say that out loud in case the customers think what something might go wrong yeah i mean i suggest you build it in a positive way so um i've always i always quote in my consent process i always say aftercare is included in the price and it's also very valuable that you say that because you will have patience if they think they're paying for a meal and say there's a complication like they react to the product and then you reverse it they'll often ask for a refund not realizing that what they've had is a seamless process where you've managed the risk for them to get them back to where they started and it's cost you three hours of your time and the product cost and your clinic costs and all of that has been built into what they paid so it's really important that you make them

aware of it at least in the consultation that you you're more than just the miller filler so and this is where great consultations all pay off if you're if you if you're basically doing a vending machine style consultation you are on the back foot already if someone walks in and says i want to mill my lips and you say that's whatever 150 pounds and then you do the treatment without really talking to them tweaking that design for that treatment explaining to them the different options delivering a good result and then and also incorporating in your communication that you're going to look after them if anything unexpected happens then you're already giving the sense that what they're paying for is the mail and actually they're not they should be paying for the service and the safety that you provide
